SMILE INDEX: 97
WINDOW: 1375.733s to 1411.400s (smile at 1395.733s to 1396.400s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1370.660-1477.560] interviewee: I sit down. What is your name? I gave him my name. Is your father alive? I said, yes. What is his name? Leopold. And he smiles. He said you know, I know your father very well. Your father came in 1915 to Breslau, to Wroclaw, now Poland, to be checked if he is well enough to go to the army, to the Austrian Army, because we were Austrians, you see? And he said, I remember

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
to
